channel.title: NOCTIS Blog
channel.description: Cybersecurity research, CTF writeups, and development notes by S. Markakis.

item.title: MikroTik: VLANs
item.description: Configuring VLANs on MikroTik RouterOS — bridge VLAN filtering, tagging, and inter-VLAN routing.

item.title: MikroTik: QoS
item.description: Quality of Service on MikroTik — queue trees, simple queues, and traffic prioritization.

item.title: MikroTik: Port Forwarding
item.description: Setting up dst-nat port forwarding rules on MikroTik RouterOS for inbound services.

item.title: MikroTik: Wake-on-LAN
item.description: Triggering Wake-on-LAN through MikroTik RouterOS — scripts, scheduling, and remote magic packets.

item.title: MikroTik: Terminal Tips
item.description: Useful RouterOS terminal commands and shortcuts for day-to-day MikroTik administration.

item.title: HTB: Authority
item.description: HackTheBox Authority machine walkthrough — full writeup with screenshots.

item.title: HTB: Blurry
item.description: HackTheBox Blurry machine walkthrough — full writeup with screenshots.

item.title: HTB: SolarLab
item.description: HackTheBox SolarLab machine walkthrough — full writeup with screenshots.

item.title: HTB: Freelancer
item.description: HackTheBox Freelancer machine walkthrough — full writeup with screenshots.

item.title: HTB: Sandworm
item.description: HackTheBox Sandworm machine walkthrough — full writeup with screenshots.
